verified_steps.title: Read the problem
verified_steps.text: Rafiq had 10 colour pencils for drawing pictures. He bought 9 more colour pencils from a shop. How many colour pencils does he have now?

review.common_mistake: Counting too many or skipping a number.

video_prompt_json.title: Rafiq's Colour Pencils
video_prompt_json.problem: Rafiq had 10 colour pencils for drawing pictures. He bought 9 more colour pencils from a shop. How many colour pencils does he have now?

scenes.narration: Let us solve 10 + 9. We will add column by column, starting from the ones place on the right.
Now the ones column. 0 plus 9 equals 9. We write 9.
Now the tens column. 1 plus 0 equals 1. We write 1.

video_prompt_json.checkpoint_question: How many colour pencils does Rafiq have now?

practice_problem.question: If I have 5 pencils and I get 4 more, how many pencils do I have now?
